stem: A linear model estimates the population of a town from 1995 to 2020. The model estimates the population was 35 thousand in 1995, 175 thousand in 2015, and x thousand in 2020. To the nearest whole number, what is the value of x?
rationale: The rate of change is (175 - 35)/(2015 - 1995) = 140/20 = 7 thousand per year. From 2015 to 2020 is 5 years, so the model estimates the population in 2020 to be 175 + 5(7) = 175 + 35 = 210 thousand. Therefore x = 210.
